title: DEFT Credit Card Payments and Points
body:
Has anyone here used a NAB credit card like NAB Qantas Rewards Signature card with DEFT rent payments recently?
My real estate now allows DEFT credit card payments for rent and I’m trying to confirm before applying whether:
• DEFT payments still earn Qantas Points on NAB
• it codes as a normal purchase vs cash advance/BPAY
• anyone has had issues with points not tracking
